title: Static Methods
description: Define a static helper method to calculate the area of a rectangle.
problemStatement:
Methods allow you to reuse logic. Inside the `Main` class, define a `public static int calculateArea(int w, int h)` method that returns `w * h`. In `main`, call it with `5, 10` and print the result.

**Expected Output:** `50`.
hints: A `static` method can be called without creating an object of the class.
